ItacAcademyItem.Name: Ardenti (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Maylender records the following publication as related to the Ardenti Academy in Venice: Danduli Pauli Hieronymi filii Oratio de prudenti optimaque Joannis Mauroceni venetae Academiae Ardentium principis administratione. Venetiis 1598.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
